evals.name: write-mode-like-post
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 spec：用户可以给帖子点赞，同一用户对同一帖子只能点一次。
evals.expected_output: A markdown spec file at docs/specs/{feature}.md with Scope (Goal + Out of Scope), AC (using '[ ] **AC-NN**' format), and Verification (BDD scenarios + TDD pointers). No UI details should appear in AC.
expectations: Output is saved to a path under docs/specs/
Spec has a top-level feature title and a Goal section (or equivalent one-sentence goal)
Spec has an 'Out of Scope' or Non-goals section with at least one entry
Spec uses '[ ] **AC-NN**' format for acceptance criteria
AC explicitly covers the uniqueness constraint: one like per user per post
AC covers the happy path (a user likes a post)
Spec has a Verification section with BDD Gherkin scenarios OR TDD pointers
BDD scenarios (if present) reference a specific AC (e.g., '# Maps to AC-01')
No UI details (colors, pixel values, button labels) appear in AC text
All AC markers are '[ ]' (not yet implemented) since this is a fresh spec

evals.name: update-mode-ac-sync
evals.prompt: 开发完了，请同步一下刚才那个点赞功能的 spec 状态。
evals.expected_output: Updated spec with AC-01/AC-02 marked [x] (both implementation and test exist), AC-03 marked [~] (DB-constraint-backed but no concurrency test), AC-04/AC-05 marked [~] or [ ] (implementation delegated to external layers with no test in this repo). Plus an Update Report following the skill's prescribed structure.
files: fixture lives in spec-dev-workspace/iteration-1/eval-2-update-mode/fixture/ — a mock project with spec, module contract, impl code, and tests
expectations: AC-01 is marked [x] (implementation + test both present)
AC-02 is marked [x] (implementation + test both present)
AC-03 is marked [~] (indirect implementation via DB UNIQUE constraint, no concurrency test)
AC-04 and AC-05 are marked either [~] (delegated) or [ ] (no implementation in this repo) — both interpretations accepted
The output explicitly flags the [~] ACs as test debt
Original AC descriptions are preserved — only the state marker changes, no explanatory text appended to the AC text itself
The Update Report includes a 'Test Coverage Gaps' or equivalent section listing the [~] ACs
Module contract is not gratuitously expanded beyond what the API signature actually requires

evals.name: audit-mode-flawed-docs
evals.expected_output: A summary-first audit report grouped by affected file. Does not modify any files.
files: fixture lives in spec-dev-workspace/iteration-1/eval-3-audit-mode/fixture/ — a docs tree with 5 known flaws
expectations: Report title includes pass count (e.g., 'N/M passed')
Failures are grouped by the affected file, not a wide matrix where every check is a column
Missing 'Out of Scope' section in specs/comment.md and specs/draft.md is flagged
specs/comment.md AC-02 '[~]' is flagged as test debt (not generic 'partial')
Missing Boundary ('Does NOT own') section in modules/comments.md is flagged
Dead link CLAUDE.md → docs/guides/design-system.md is flagged
No files are modified during the audit
Passed checks are collapsed (e.g., in a <details> block) rather than shown in full
